description_long: This armchair features a high, wingback design with a gently curved wooden frame and ornate carved legs. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a patterned fabric with a zigzag motif in neutral tones, complemented by a contrasting plain fabric on the outer sides and back. The armrests are padded and upholstered, with exposed wood trim that matches the frame. A single, rectangular accent cushion in a subtly striped fabric sits against the backrest, adding comfort and visual interest. The back of the chair is fully upholstered in a solid, light-colored fabric, giving it a refined and finished appearance from all angles. The overall style blends classic and contemporary elements, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A high-backed, winged armchair with patterned upholstery, carved wooden frame, and a decorative accent cushion. The design combines classic elegance with modern fabric patterns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high, winged backrest, padded armrest, and carved wooden legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the zigzag patterned upholstery, accent cushion, and symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the high back and armrest details, with the cushion partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid, light-colored upholstery and the curved wooden frame.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered with exposed wood trim
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged with a gently curved top and upholstered surface
attribute_leg_type: carved wooden legs with ornate detailing
attribute_upholstery_pattern: zigzag patterned fabric on seat and backrest, solid fabric on sides and back
